arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano considering move to sign Real Madrid star in January
arts.sum: Despite the fact that Real Madrid have the likes of Eder Militao, David Alaba, Aurelien Tchouameni and Jacobo Ramon unavailable due to injury, Jesus Vallejo is not counted on as a central defensive option by Carlo Ancelotti. The 28-year-old is alongside Antonio Rudiger and Raul Asencio as centre-backs in the first team, but despite the […] The post Rayo Vallecano considering move to sign Real Madrid star in January appeared first on Football España.
